---
title: "Cleaning_Data"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}

library(forecast)
library(Kendall)
library(tseries)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(smooth)
library(zoo)
library(kableExtra)
library(tidyr)

```


```{r}

bird_data <- read.csv("./Data/Raw/eBird_Species_Data.csv")

```


## Data Cleaning


```{r}
warbler_data <- bird_data %>% 
  filter(COMMON.NAME == "Yellow-rumped Warbler") %>%
  mutate(
     OBSERVATION.DATE = as.Date(OBSERVATION.DATE),
     OBSERVATION.COUNT = ifelse(OBSERVATION.COUNT == "X", 1, OBSERVATION.COUNT),
     OBSERVATION.COUNT = as.numeric(OBSERVATION.COUNT)) %>%
  group_by(OBSERVATION.DATE) %>% 
  summarise(sum_obs = sum(OBSERVATION.COUNT, na.rm = TRUE))
  
ggplot(warbler_data, aes(x = OBSERVATION.DATE, y = sum_obs)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Yellow-rumped Warbler Observations Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Total Observations"
  )
  #xlim(as.Date("2020-01-01"), as.Date("2022-12-31"))

```

```{r}

canada_goose_data <- bird_data %>% 
  filter(COMMON.NAME == "Canada Goose") %>%
  mutate(
     OBSERVATION.DATE = as.Date(OBSERVATION.DATE),
     OBSERVATION.COUNT = ifelse(OBSERVATION.COUNT == "X", 1, OBSERVATION.COUNT),
     OBSERVATION.COUNT = as.numeric(OBSERVATION.COUNT)) %>%
  group_by(OBSERVATION.DATE) %>% 
  summarise(sum_obs = sum(OBSERVATION.COUNT, na.rm = TRUE))
  
ggplot(warbler_data, aes(x = OBSERVATION.DATE, y = sum_obs)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Canada Goose Observations Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Total Observations"
  )


```

```{r}
hummingbird_data <- bird_data %>% 
  filter(COMMON.NAME == "Ruby-throated Hummingbird") %>%
  mutate(
     OBSERVATION.DATE = as.Date(OBSERVATION.DATE),
     OBSERVATION.COUNT = ifelse(OBSERVATION.COUNT == "X", 1, OBSERVATION.COUNT),
     OBSERVATION.COUNT = as.numeric(OBSERVATION.COUNT)) %>%
  group_by(OBSERVATION.DATE) %>% 
  summarise(sum_obs = sum(OBSERVATION.COUNT, na.rm = TRUE))
  
ggplot(warbler_data, aes(x = OBSERVATION.DATE, y = sum_obs)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Ruby-throated Hummingbird Observations Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Total Observations"
  )


```

```{r}
#Compute mean and standard deviation without missing values
goose_mean_obs <- mean(na.exclude(canada_goose_data$sum_obs))  #exclude NA or missing observation to compute mean and std
goose_sd_obs <- sd(na.exclude(canada_goose_data$sum_obs))

cat(goose_mean_obs,goose_sd_obs)

ggplot(canada_goose_data, aes(x = OBSERVATION.DATE, y = sum_obs)) +
            geom_line() +
            geom_abline(slope=0,intercept=3*goose_sd_obs,color="red") +
            geom_abline(slope=0,intercept=-3*goose_sd_obs,color="red")
```
```{r}

humm_mean_obs <- mean(na.exclude(hummingbird_data$sum_obs))  #exclude NA or missing observation to compute mean and std
humm_sd_obs <- sd(na.exclude(hummingbird_data$sum_obs))

cat(humm_mean_obs,humm_sd_obs)

ggplot(hummingbird_data, aes(x = OBSERVATION.DATE, y = sum_obs)) +
            geom_line() +
            geom_abline(slope=0,intercept=3*humm_sd_obs,color="red") +
            geom_abline(slope=0,intercept=-3*humm_sd_obs,color="red")

```




```{r}

warb_mean_obs <- mean(na.exclude(warbler_data$sum_obs))  #exclude NA or missing observation to compute mean and std
warb_sd_obs <- sd(na.exclude(warbler_data$sum_obs))

cat(warb_mean_obs,warb_sd_obs)

ggplot(warbler_data, aes(x = OBSERVATION.DATE, y = sum_obs)) +
            geom_line() +
            geom_abline(slope=0,intercept=3*warb_sd_obs,color="red") +
            geom_abline(slope=0,intercept=-3*warb_sd_obs,color="red")

```



```{r}

min_warb_date <- warbler_data$OBSERVATION.DATE[1]
max_warb_date <- warbler_data$OBSERVATION.DATE[nrow(warbler_data)]

warbler_date_fill <- warbler_data %>%
  complete(OBSERVATION.DATE = seq(min_warb_date,
                                 max_warb_date,
                                 by = "1 day")) %>% 
  mutate(sum_obs = ifelse(is.na(sum_obs) , 0, sum_obs))

warbler_ts <- ts(warbler_date_fill$sum_obs, start = c(2002, 51), frequency = 365)

autoplot(warbler_ts)


library(zoo)

warbler_zoo <- zoo(warbler_date_fill$sum_obs,
                   order.by = warbler_date_fill$OBSERVATION.DATE)

warbler_ts <- as.ts(warbler_zoo)

autoplot(warbler_ts)



warbler_clean <- tsclean(warbler_ts)

autoplot(warbler_clean)
```
